reviews.review_description: I gifted this to my child but she can’t play it because it is blocked for “age restriction”. This is pretty annoying since this is rated E

For some reason this app fully blocks running from child's account even though it is rated E. I have installed and approved many apps for multiple children's accounts and this is the first that pops an age restriction modal instead of the send request modal when attempting to load. Guess I'll be submitting a request for refund.

reviews.review_title: I can’t play on my meta 3s
reviews.review_description: This app doesn’t work for the meta 3s

developer_response.body: Is the game giving you any sort of error? how is the issue presenting itself?

reviews.review_description: It is a fun game but there are some bugs. I am trying to get perfect score for each level but for level 13, it keeps giving me negative points right off the bat even though I am not doing anything. Making it impossible to get perfect scores on the other levels. Can you guys please fix level 13, I saw some reviews with the same problem of starting in the negative points cause of environment interference without the user control.

Looked like a fun and cute, refreshingly non-violent game, but right at the very beginning, when you are supposed to sort some green and red cubes by colour, there were only plain white ones at my disposal. Strange.
lov this so much fun very colourful
Worth the money
Has anybody got any idea what you have to do with the big robot facing you and two big floating ball things,i havnt a clue?????????

developer_response.body:
Hello Steve, There should be instruction panels at the beginning of each level indicating what is expected.
~The Armature Team.

reviews.review_description: No not recomend for adults
Simple & fun.  I hope the game adds more activities related to bot building.
Has the potential to be a decent game, too bad the game glitches out on some levels and gives you a negative score before you even start. Developers need to do some work on it.
I'm not enjoying this game I rather have Scrambled instead wish I could switch

developer_response.body:
Hello Demetria, We're sorry that you're not enjoying Fail Factory!, if you are still within the refund period, you can request one by following this link. https://tickets.oculusvr.com/hc/en-us/requests/new

~The Armature Team.

reviews.review_description: I like the story!

Casting this for my kids and it has terrible static like pops and noise. I don’t know what’s going on but it’s the only time I have these popping sounds. It loads and the first tunnel to the main menu is fine. Once I get to the main menu the unbearable noise starts.

This game has an amazing scenery and characters. The mini games are fun as you try and race up the leaderboard, the sorting game was my favourite as you pick up boxes and launch thumb into holes. I would of gave this full stars but I notice in game the audio crackles from time to time, casting it on TV or starting a stream caused the stream audio to create “popping and cracking” sounds. It would be great to have this bug fixed. 👍🏻

Overall: Great game with nice understandable concept great replay ability.
This game I 200% recommend one of the best games on the quest and they have an amazing customer service team. I cannot recommend you get this game enough. Its awsome just absolutely amazing
Honestly a great game I have had lots of fun with it. It’s simplicity is great in a fun way, and for the price of $5 it exceeded my expectations greatly and it’s definitely worth it.
It’s graphics are good and perfect for me
They made you get perfect on everything instead of adding more content.But its just 5 bucks but some of the levels are bad  but again its only 5 bucks worth every dollar

developer_response.body:
Hello ViruZAngel,
You can disable the tunnel transitions and use a teleporter type function by entering the options menu and turning "Slip Pod Movement" to off.
~The Armature Team.

reviews.review_title: Great fun with one minor glitch
reviews.review_description: I’m an adult playing this game and I am loving it! Some levels are more challenging than others but it’s fun all around. There does seem to be a glitch on drone level 13. Most times I play on this level I start by seeing -1,000 or more points deducted for something I don’t even know is happening in the background. More often than not I end up with a negative final score. Other than that, I feel you can’t beat it for the price. Well done!
